title: Add a small pure helper function
user_task: Add a pure helper function `normalize_slug(text: str) -> str` and write tests for common formatting cases.
repository_context: Small Python utility package. Tests live under `tests/`. Existing helpers already normalize whitespace but there is no slug helper yet.
acceptance_criteria: Collapse internal whitespace to one hyphen
Tests cover mixed case and repeated whitespace
risk_notes: Keep the implementation pure and small

title: Fix a validation bug with a minimal patch
user_task: Fix a bug where empty email strings are accepted as valid input and add a regression test.
repository_context: Backend service with a validation module and unit tests. The codebase prefers small patches and explicit tests over broad refactors.
acceptance_criteria: Existing valid email cases still pass

title: Add tests for an uncovered edge case
user_task: Add tests for the parser edge case where repeated commas produce empty tokens in the output.
repository_context: Parser module already exists. The likely fix is either adding tests only or adding a very small parser patch if behavior is clearly wrong.
acceptance_criteria: Behavior for repeated commas is documented by tests
If a code fix is needed, keep it minimal
Final review should say whether the parser behavior is now explicit
risk_notes: Do not over-normalize parser behavior without evidence
